description: Fire a Dagster RunRequest when a Precisely Connect ETL job-run reaches terminal SUCCESS. Uses the documented Job Status endpoint only — sensor-only because Precisely does not publish submit / list-runs endpoints.

job_run_id.label: Job Run ID
job_run_id.description: Precisely Connect ETL job-run ID to watch (the only REST surface we can reliably hit).

job_name.label: Job Name
job_name.description: Dagster job to trigger when Precisely run reaches terminal SUCCESS

host_env_var.label: Host Env Var
host_env_var.description: Env var with Precisely Connect host URL

api_token_env_var.label: Api Token Env Var
api_token_env_var.description: Env var with Precisely API token

name: Precisely Job Sensor
